_comment: Phase 5 joinable NPC templates. Each template defines a 'rarity' (common, uncommon, rare, legendary) and an optional weight for the spawn roll. min_player_level is the absolute minimum the player must be at. min_faction_rep is per-faction (null = any faction). requires_quest is an optional mission id that must be in the player's active missions. tier is the armor/weapon tier the NPC starts with. role is one of the roles in npc_name_parts.titles.

templates.title: wanderer
templates.description: A drifter from outside the local area. Easy to recruit early on.

templates.title: mercenary
templates.description: An officer of one of the factions. Better gear, higher requirements.

templates.title: shaman
templates.description: Locked behind a quest. Powerful specialist.

templates.title: wanderer
templates.description: Legendary NPCs with their own backstories. Open shops at your base if you treat them right.

_spawn_rules._comment: Per-hex-visit spawn rules. Most hexes have no joinable NPCs (the spawn rate is low).
